title: Refactor pilot schema and legacy mapping
objective: Replace the pilot five-layer bundle schema with four content pools and update the legacy BLIND_BOXES mapping.
requirements: Use exactly core_items, support_items, visible_small_items, scene_expansion_items for pilot bundles.
Remove conditional_items and blocked_or_risky from pilot bundle schema.
Update BLIND_BOX_COMPATIBILITY_MAPPING to reflect four-pool sources.
acceptance_criteria: Pilot bundle keys are exactly the four content pools.
BLIND_BOXES[15], BLIND_BOXES[16], and BLIND_BOXES[17] still expose the legacy four buckets.
No compatibility mapping references conditional_items or blocked_or_risky.

result.summary: Pilot bundles now use four content pools, compatibility mapping no longer references conditional_items or blocked_or_risky, and BLIND_BOXES keeps the legacy four buckets.
